name: Butternut Squash Soup with Honey and Roasted Barley Risotto
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 quarts roasted butternut squash soup (see recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over moderate heat, sauté shallots, garlic, and celery in oil and butter until tender. Add rice, stirring to coat well. Do not let grains brown.
2. Add 3 1/2 cups soup in small batches, stirring continuously.
3. Add barley and squash. Continue cooking in the same manner until rice is tender but al dente. Add cheese. Adjust seasoning.
4. Per portion, spoon a dollop of risotto into the center of the soup bowl. Ladle 1 cup soup around risotto.
